The '''''Apocahk''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial extermination ship|extermination ship]].

==History==
Along with the ''[[Angrix]]'' and ''[[Azgoghk]]'', it was used by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Danetta Pitta]] to exterminate and experiment on [[Alien/Legends|aliens]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

{{Ship-stub}}
